extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts at a relatively high value (around 0.5–0.8) and shows a sharp, monotonic drop to near-minimum levels (≈0.05–0.15) within the first third of the series.  
R2: After reaching this minimum, it stays low for some time, with only small oscillations and no strong rebound above ≈0.3.  
R3: In the last third, it recovers moderately but does not show any very sharp spike; the final value remains below about 0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts at a moderate value and also drops sharply early, but the minimum reached is slightly higher (typically ≥0.1) or the drop is less prolonged than in class 0.  
R2: After the early drop, it exhibits a pronounced mid-series plateau or hump, where values stay elevated (≈0.4–0.55) for an extended segment.  
R3: In the final third, it often shows a clear upward surge or spike (or at least maintains the elevated level), with values commonly reaching or exceeding ≈0.6.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a medium–high value (~0.5–0.8) and exhibits a steep monotonic drop during the first 10–20 time steps.  
R2: After this drop, the series remains in a low plateau region (roughly 0.05–0.25) for a substantial middle segment.  
R3: In the last third of the series, the value rises back toward a medium level (~0.35–0.55) but does not exceed its initial peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a medium–high value and quickly drops to a low region within the first 10–20 time steps, similar in shape to class 0.  
R2: In the middle part, the series rises to a mid–high plateau (~0.4–0.55) and stays there with small oscillations.  
R3: Near the end (final 10–20 time steps), the series exhibits a pronounced additional peak or upward spike that clearly exceeds the preceding middle plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts at a medium–high value and then quickly drops to a low value within the first 20–25% of the series.  
R2: Stays at a low value (near the minimum) for a noticeable middle segment.  
R3: Gradually rises again in the last third, ending around a medium value without a sharp final spike.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts at a medium–high value, but the initial drop is less steep and does not stay at the very bottom for long.  
R2: Rises to a medium plateau in the middle of the series and oscillates around that level.  
R3: Shows a pronounced upward spike near the end, reaching one of the highest values in the entire series in the last 10–15% of time.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts high (above ~0.6) and drops steeply to a low plateau (around 0.1–0.2) within the first third of the series.  
R2: After this minimum, rises gradually to a medium level (around 0.4–0.5) by the last third, without any sharp spike near the very end.  
R3: Overall variance is moderate: no segment after the first drop shows changes larger than about 0.15–0.2 in a few consecutive steps.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Also starts high and drops to a low level early, but the minimum is reached slightly later and/or less sharply than in Class 0.  
R2: Middle section forms a clearer “bump”: a more pronounced rise from the minimum to around 0.45–0.55, then a gentle decline or flattening.  
R3: In at least one of the last quarters of the series there is a noticeable upward surge or spike (increase of >~0.2) that stands out from the preceding medium-level fluctuations.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak, the series falls quickly to a clear low valley and then rises smoothly into a broad middle plateau without any very sharp spike at the end.  
R2: The middle section (roughly the central half of the time axis) stays relatively smooth, with only small oscillations around a gently rising trend.  
R3: The final part of the series remains at moderate values and does not contain a late, isolated peak much higher than the preceding middle plateau.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak and drop, the series also rises to a middle plateau but this plateau is more oscillatory, with visibly stronger short-term up‑and‑down fluctuations.  
R2: Near the very end of the series there is a distinct, sharp upward spike that clearly exceeds the level of the earlier middle plateau.  
R3: The value at that final spike is among the highest in the entire series, typically comparable to or higher than the first major peak at the beginning.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial peak, the signal drops quickly to a low level (below about 0.2) within the first quarter of the series.  
R2: Around the middle of the series, the signal climbs from this low level up to a moderate level (about 0.4–0.6).  
R3: In the last third, the signal stays roughly in that moderate band without any large spike higher than the earlier initial peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After an initial peak, the signal also drops quickly, but the minimum stays slightly higher (around 0.1–0.2, not persistently near 0).  
R2: Around the middle of the series, the signal rises to a moderate level (about 0.4–0.6), similar to Class 0.  
R3: In the last third, the signal shows a pronounced late spike or sharp rise that clearly exceeds the mid‑series level (creating a secondary high peak near the end).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around time 10–20), the series reaches a low plateau below about 0.2 that lasts for a relatively long segment (about 10–20 time units).
R2: After this low plateau, the series rises and then stays in a mid-range band roughly between 0.35 and 0.55 without any very sharp spikes to near 0.7 or higher.
R3: In the final quarter of the series, there is no strong upward spike; the values remain in that mid-range or drift slightly but do not exceed about 0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around time 10–20), the series reaches a low region, but this low part is shorter and/or not as flat as in Class 0, with values not staying long below 0.15.
R2: After this low, the series rises to a mid-range band (around 0.4–0.55) with noticeable small oscillations rather than a smoother plateau.
R3: In the last 10–20% of the series, there is a pronounced upward spike, with the value shooting clearly above about 0.6–0.7 before the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak, the signal drops quickly to a low valley and stays low for a relatively long middle segment.  
R2: In the middle of the series, the signal forms a broad, smooth U‑shape (single main valley) rather than multiple sharp oscillations.  
R3: The final part of the series rises to a moderate level and then remains roughly flat or gently fluctuating without any very high spike near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak and drop, the signal also has a low middle region, but this valley is shorter and followed by a quicker, steeper rise.  
R2: In the central/high region, the signal shows more pronounced, irregular oscillations (several local ups and downs) instead of a single smooth U‑shape.  
R3: Near the end of the series, the signal typically exhibits a distinct late high peak or sharp rise that exceeds the earlier central plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts high (above ~0.6) and drops steeply to a low valley (below ~0.15) within the first third of the series.  
R2: After this early valley, rises to a moderate plateau around 0.4–0.55 in the middle part of the series.  
R3: Ends at a moderate level (around 0.35–0.5) without any sharp spike in the last 10–15% of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts high (above ~0.5) and drops to a low valley (below ~0.15) within the first third of the series, similar to class 0.  
R2: After the valley, rises to a moderate plateau around 0.4–0.55 in the middle part of the series, again similar to class 0.  
R3: Exhibits a clear late upward surge: in the last 10–15% of the series the values rise rapidly, forming a peak above ~0.6 before ending.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts high (around 0.7–0.8) and drops steeply within the first 15–20 time steps to a low value (≈0.1–0.2).  
R2: After this early drop, the series remains low (≈0.1–0.3) for a relatively long middle segment.  
R3: In the last third, the series rises from this low region but stays at or below a moderate level (≤≈0.55) without any strong late spike.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series also starts high and drops steeply early on, but the minimum reached in the first 20–30 time steps is slightly higher or shorter-lived than in class 0 (it does not stay very low for long).  
R2: In the middle segment, the series forms a broad “hill”, staying at an intermediate level (≈0.4–0.55) with noticeable small oscillations.  
R3: In the final part, the series either stays roughly at this intermediate level or shows a clear late spike above ≈0.6–0.7 near the end.
